dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of today's bell activity
dashboard.bellHealthOk: All bells rang successfully in the last 24 hours
dashboard.bellHealthFailures: {{count}} bell(s) failed to ring in the last 24 hours

settings.closeToTray: Closing the window doesn't quit OpenBell - it keeps running in the system tray so scheduled bells keep ringing.
settings.outputDeviceDesc: Choose which speaker/output device bells play through. Leave on "System default" to let Windows decide automatically (recommended for most setups).
settings.lanSyncDesc: Share bell schedules between PCs on the same Wi-Fi/network - no internet needed. Pick "Host" on the main office PC that you edit schedules on, and "Client" on every other PC that should ring the same bells.
settings.lanHostHint: On each Client PC, go to Settings → Multi-PC Sync → Client, and enter this address:
settings.lanHostIpLabel: Host PC's address (shown on the Host's Settings page)
settings.lanConnectionOk: Connected! The Host PC is reachable.
settings.lanConnectionFailed: Could not reach that address. Make sure both PCs are on the same network and the Host PC's OpenBell is open.
settings.lanSyncSuccess: Synced {{schedules}} schedules and {{holidays}} holidays from the Host.
settings.lanSyncFailed: Sync failed. Check the Host address and that both PCs are on the same network.
settings.lanAutoSyncNote: This PC will also auto-sync from the Host every 5 minutes in the background. Note: sound files themselves aren't transferred - upload the same sound file names on each PC.
settings.remoteViewerDesc: Turn this on to let anyone on the same Wi-Fi/network open a simple read-only page on their phone or tablet browser showing the next bell countdown. No login, no editing - just a live view.
settings.remoteViewerHint: Open this address in a browser on any phone/tablet connected to the same network:
settings.remoteViewerNoAuth: Anyone on this network can view this page (read-only, no password). Don't enable this on a public/shared Wi-Fi network.
settings.schoolInfoDesc: This name and logo appear at the top of the app for everyone using this PC.
settings.forgotPasswordHint: Forgot the password later? On the lock screen, tap "Forgot password?" and enter the recovery code shown above to set a new one.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversible actions. There's no undo button for anything here.

support.intro: Need help with OpenBell? Reach out to the developer directly using the contact details below.
support.helpBody: For bug reports, feature requests, licensing questions, or general support, email the developer or visit the website below. Please include your OpenBell version when reporting an issue.
support.footer: OpenBell is built and maintained by {{name}}.
support.shortcutsDesc: Speed up data entry on the Bell Schedules page with these shortcuts.
support.shortcutsScope: These work while the Bell Schedules page is open.
support.newVersionFound: A new version is available: v{{version}}

wizard.welcomeDesc: Let's get your school's bell schedule set up. This will only take a minute.
wizard.timezoneDesc: Bells ring according to this timezone, regardless of what timezone the PC's clock is set to.
wizard.passwordDesc: Add a password so only staff can change schedules. You can always turn this on/off later in Settings.
wizard.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
wizard.recoveryDesc: If you ever forget your password, you'll need this code to reset it. Write it down or copy it somewhere safe - it won't be shown again.

schedules.copyPanelDesc: Already set up all the bells for one day? Copy that whole set straight onto other days instead of re-creating each one — e.g. set up Monday once, then copy it onto Tuesday–Friday.
schedules.noSoundsWarningPart1: No sounds uploaded yet. Go to
schedules.noSoundsWarningPart2: page and upload an audio file first, then assign it to a schedule.
schedules.emptyState: No schedules yet. Click "Add Schedule" to create one.
schedules.pickAtLeastOneDay: Pick at least one day to copy to.
schedules.noBellsSetForDay: No bells are set for {{day}} yet — nothing to copy.

sounds.confirmDelete: Delete this sound? Any schedules using it will lose their sound assignment.
sounds.emptyStatePart2: to add an MP3 or WAV file.

reports.timezoneNote: All times shown in Sri Lanka time (Asia/Colombo)
reports.noEntries: No log entries found for the selected filters.

lock.title: OpenBell is locked
lock.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 4 characters.
lock.invalidRecoveryCode: Invalid recovery code. Check the code and try again.
lock.enterRecoveryPrompt: Enter your recovery code to set a new password.
lock.recoveryCodeNoticePart1: Your password was reset. Here is your
lock.recoveryCodeNoticePart2: recovery code — save it somewhere safe. The old code no longer works, and this one will not be shown again.

update.available: 🎉 OpenBell v{{version}} is available (you have v{{current}}).
